creator: olivierw1+bugzilla-freebsd@hotmail.com
text:
Hello,
On May 30th, around 11h30 I created an account on the forum and activated it.
Then, I posted an answer in this thread: https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/55141/ to help the users.

Now, I see my message is gone and also my account.

Has the database crashed and you had to rollback to a previous version? Or what happened to my account and message?
